title: KEYIDO 20 Pack Large Red Pull Bows for Gift Wrapping, Big Gift Wrapping Bows for Presents, Hampers, Bouquet Boxes, Floristry, Birthday, Valentine's Day, Wedding Decoration(Red Bow)
features: Package Includes: 20 Pcs plain gorgeous red decorative pull bows in a clear plastic box. Red gift bows measure approx 16 x 27 cm
Exquisite Gifts Decoration: These red present bows have bright colors, stylish and elegant, non-fading. Make your gift more attractive and stand out from all others
Material: Durable PP material, waterproof and not easy to be broke, pure color, reusable (with care)
Easy to Use: They are easy to assemble, just pull the core ribbon inward and slide the outer ribbon upwards to show the ideal bow shape in seconds
Wide Applications: These red ribbon bows are perfect for gift wrapping and wedding decorations
description: Product Description Easy to use, just need to pull the ribbon strings to form a beautiful bow, which will not waste time but will also make your gift more attractive. Stylish and elegant with white bows, you can tie them around your parcel without the risk of them falling off. Perfect for Christmas, Valentine's Day, Easter, birthdays, parties, gift wrapping, hampers, and wedding decorations. Specification: Name: Decorative pull bows Material: PP Forming size: 16 x 27 c
